description: 1 agent = 1 zone. No shared file edits without publish-flow. Copy to <project>/.claude/agents/ownership.json and customize.

lead.description: Orchestrator. Reads state, delegates tasks, reviews PRs, manages dependencies.
can_write: state only — delegates all code changes

backend.description: Backend services, API, DB models, migrations.

frontend.description: UI components, pages, styling, client-side logic.

rules.shared_file_edit: Only through publish-flow: agent proposes change in contract, lead approves, owner applies.
rules.conflict_resolution: Lead decides. If lead unavailable, owner of the file has priority.
rules.new_files: Agent can create files only within their owned directories.
